title: Lava Chicken Lava
description: Retextures the Lava Chicken music disc to look more like Lava!
body:
![Lava Chicken Lava Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4747d1a690f76240e090d1088a9f9f41a675971e.png)

**Turns the "Lava Chicken" Music Disc by Hyper Potions to look more like Lava!**



L-L-L-Lava! Ch-Ch-Ch-Chicken!
